title: selaginella kouytcheensis
intro: Selaginella kouytcheensis, a species of the genus Selaginella, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial, or epiphytic plant commonly known as a spikemoss. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella kouytcheensis include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
